facebook.caption: Under $30 for a full seafood spread in Phu Quoc. At Phuong Hoang Seafood Restaurant on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, that's exactly what you get. 1,854 reviews and a 4.5-star rating back it up. Fresh catches, local atmosphere, no resort markup. This is where you eat when you want real Phu Quoc seafood without the tourist-trap bill. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the seafood land on the table at Phuong Hoang Seafood Restaurant. Grilled, steamed, sauced, and under $30 a head. 1,854 people already know. Now you do.

instagram.caption: $15-30 for a full seafood meal in Phu Quoc. Phuong Hoang Seafood Restaurant. 4.5 stars, 1,854 reviews. Save this.
instagram.video_caption: Fresh seafood. $30 max. 1,854 reviews don't lie. Phuong Hoang Seafood Restaurant delivers.
